attributes.title: [RabbitMQ OTel] Queues
attributes.description: Queue-level view: message depths (ready/unack), consumer counts, publish and delivery rates, and dropped messages per queue.

Queue-level monitoring for RabbitMQ:
- Ready vs unacknowledged message counts per queue
- Publish and delivery rates over time
- Consumer count per queue
- Dropped (unroutable) messages
- Queue ranking and backlog identification
